title: pleurospermum isetense
intro: Pleurospermum isetense, also known as Iset's Angelica, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Pleurospermum isetense include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
